name: Mexicali Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans 14.5 oz. Old El Paso Tamales
1 can Vienna Sausages, cut into thirds
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wrappers from the first can of tamales and cut them into thirds.
2. Combine the cut tamales, yellow corn, sausages, and condensed chicken soup in a 1.5 quart casserole dish.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
4. Remove wrappers from the second can of tamales and cut them diagonally into halves.
5. Garnish the top of the casserole with the remaining cut tamales.
6. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the top.
7. Return the dish to the oven and bake until the cheese melts and the top tamales are heated through.
8. Serves 6.
